Petition To Restrain Defendants' Foreclosure Sale Of Plaintiffs' Home
Off Calendar Jul-09-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No Appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: Petition To Restrain Defendants' Foreclosure Sale Of Plaintiffs' Home is OFF CALENDAR. Plaintiff failed to comply with TRO/OSC order. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk N. Bautista, Not Reported, (D501)
